title: LinkedIn Learning India is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)

jsonLd.title: LinkedIn Learning India is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
LinkedIn Learning India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Subject Matter Expert for our Vadodara operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About LinkedIn Learning India:
LinkedIn Learning India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LinkedIn Learning India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
